title: Fashion Inspiration: Valentine’s Day
excerpt: Fashion Inspiration: Valentine’s Day Maybe you have your dress and heels picked out for your fancy Valentine’s Dinner, but maybe you’re keeping it low key that day and still want to look cute. Here are a few pieces that when put together are perfect for this Saturday!
content:
Fashion Inspiration: Valentine’s Day

Maybe you have your dress and heels picked out for your fancy Valentine’s Dinner, but maybe you’re keeping it low key that day and still want to look cute. Here are a few pieces that when put together are perfect for this Saturday!

With just one pair of red skinny pants, you can score two looks! Add a heart printed button down blouse, adorable clutch, a cuff bracelet and a pair of amazing(ly expensive) Christian Louboutin’s, you can have a chic look perfect for the day. For a way more casual look, add a plain white tee, scarf and flats and you’re ready to go. You can even mix and match if you like pieces from both looks- it’s your day! Do what you like!

Red Slim Fit Pants: H&M

Heart Blouse: H&M

Kate Spade New York Love Birds Wink Clutch: Zappos Couture

Hinged Leaf Cuff Bracelet: Target

Cora Heart Sandals from Christian Louboutin: Neiman Marcus

White Crew Tee: Target

Fossil Mini Crossbody Bag in Ruby Wine: Macy’s

Patterned Heart Scarf: H&M

Hilary Flats from Alice + Olivia: Zappos

Nail Polish: Essie Nail Color in Really Red

Lipstick: e.l.f. Studio Moisturizing Lipstick in Red Carpet

Red Polka Dotted Hair Bow: Katie Crafts

I’m officially obsessed with that winking clutch. How cute is that!? I’d rock it every day. Which is your favorite item?

featuredImage.alt: Fashion Inspiration: Valentine's Day (two looks!) by Katie Crafts; http://www.katiecrafts.com
